_comment: Single tuning surface for MADE fair-play. Adjust these when an exploit emerges — no code change needed. Read by validate.mjs (CI gate) and, once the rules engine lands, by the match runtime so live-balancing is data-driven.

statBudget._comment: A body's ATK+HP must not exceed slope*cost + base. Lower these if aggressive stat-lines dominate; raise if bodies feel too weak.

starterDecks._comment: Preconstructed starter decks should be close in tempo; widen/narrow spread as the meta shifts.

answerDensity._comment: Formats need answers or an unanswered bomb becomes a complete advantage. Require removal to exist.

wildcards._comment: Street-Event trigger chances (the luck layer). Tune to keep variance fun but not swingy.
